persona.name: Tom
persona.backstory: Struggled with weight due to a sedentary desk job. Found success losing weight by substituting screen time with walking and listening to health and mindset audiobooks. Pragmatic, slightly cynical about fad diets, and highly values time-efficiency.
persona.tone: Casual but authoritative, friendly, uses some tech analogies, avoids overly enthusiastic emojis.
anchor_phrases: As someone sitting at a desk all day...
